name: Meditation Pillow Dark Green - All In Motion™: Buckwheat Hulls Fill, Indoor Use
description:
Why we're ALL IN:

Soft circular pillow with filling is designed to take your yoga and meditation sessions to the next level. The soft-touch fabric and filling provide plenty of support, and the solid hue pairs easily with the decor of any room. Best of all, the removable, machine-washable cover makes it easy to keep the pillow fresh and clean.

All in Motion™: Made for every move, priced for every day.
